text: I took this course with a special interest on the musical aspect , namely the blues , of course . In that regard the course is very superficial , but has some interesting stuff even so . The other aspects of literature , painting , and the more popular arts ( kilts , oral traditions , etc . ) where a nice surprise . This course gives a view of a cultural aspect of America that is very interesting and mostly unknown , particularly , I guess , to a non American . I advise this course to anyone who is interested in ethnology , folklore and popular art and music and is not already familiarized with the American South .
